business_context.specialties: Weekly pool maintenance, green-to-clean recovery (specialty), pool opening/closing, equipment repair, water testing. NO new construction or resurfacing.
business_context.photo_notes: URLs extracted from perezpools.com Wix 'Our Work' gallery via WebFetch. 10 JPG/JPEG photos confirmed. Website also has PNGs (likely graphics/logos) which were filtered out.

photo_count_from_gbp_estimate: 10 confirmed JPG photos on website. Additional photos may exist on GBP that require manual extraction.

source_urls.source: Google Places API (Mac Mini Layer 1, manual unblock by Mini)
source_urls.extraction_method: Places API lookup with place_id ChIJ-7XajO6Vk00Rwdi8tIMV8KE
source_urls.previous_extraction_superseded: Earlier Wix-CDN extraction is now replaced by authoritative Places URLs. Retained for reference only.

hero.search_for: Dramatic green-to-clean pool transformation (before/after split) OR Chris Perez team at work on a pool. The green-to-clean angle is their signature.

gallery.search_for: Pool service work: green-to-clean transformations, pool equipment, water testing, clean pools post-service.

specs.quality_hint: JPEG quality 75-85. Preserve detail in both pool water and deck areas.

fallback_strategy.if_insufficient_urls: If source_urls photos turn out to be non-contextual (headshots, logos, etc.), fall back to Unsplash contextual search: 'swimming pool maintenance service' for gallery, 'pool cleaning technician' for hero. Do NOT use generic pool stock without service context.

acceptance_criteria: Hero shows either a dramatic green-to-clean transformation OR real Perez Pools work
Gallery shows authentic pool service, not staged stock pool scenes
Before/after pairs are ideal where available
pilot_notes: Mini's 'photo-heavy trade' pilot case. 10 real photo URLs extracted via WebFetch. Per Mini's contract update: source_urls is primary, Bruce downloads directly.
